title: poa mollis
intro: Poa mollis, also known as red fescue, is a species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Poa mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments in a holistic and natural way.
